# Oracle JET Component WebElements
Usage:

```javascript
import ojwd from '@oracle/oraclejet-webdriver';
import { ojInputText } from '@oracle/oraclejet-webdriver/elements';

describe('My suite of tests', function() {
  it('can use Component WebElements', async function() {
    let input = await ojInputText(driver, By.id('text-input-1'));
    ...
  })
})
```
## oraclejet-webdriver is compatible with:
- [selenium-webdriver 3.6.0](https://www.npmjs.com/package/selenium-webdriver/v/3.6.0)
- NodeJS 12+
- TypeScript 4+

See [Testing JET UIs With WebDriver](https://confluence.oraclecorp.com/confluence/display/JET/Testing+JET+UIs+With+WebDriver) for details.
